rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

suggestedActions: Verify inputs before making financial decisions.
Consult a licensed financial advisor for personalized advice.

description.short: Calculate the maximum drawdown (MDD) from peak to trough.
description.long: Calculate the maximum drawdown (MDD) from peak to trough.

short_i18n.en: Calculate the maximum drawdown (MDD) from peak to trough.
short_i18n.tr: Portföyün zirveden dibe yaşadığı en büyük yüzde kaybını (MDD) hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie den maximalen Drawdown (MDD) vom Höchst- zum Tiefststand.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer le drawdown maximum (MDD) du pic au creux.
short_i18n.es: Calcular la reducción máxima (MDD) desde el pico hasta el valle.
short_i18n.ar: احسب أقصى انخفاض (MDD) من الذروة إلى القاع.
